creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text: This release features tabbed playlists, playlist search, projectM visualisations, Magnatune integration, ReplayGain volume normalisation and music transcoding. We've fixed loads of bugs too - searching large libraries is now much faster, playback is much more reliable on Windows, character encoding problems are fixed, and remote playlists should load correctly all the time. See the changelog for more information. Download version 0.4 for Windows, Mac and Linux from the downloads page.
